description: Composition Black V-neck sweater made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed neck line and hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Classic s.oliver style sweater for men. This sweater promises exemplary comfort with its luxe fabric. Smart enough to wear with a shirt. Wear this with a crisp shirt, denims or formal trousers, an understated belt and shoes from red tape. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
